# Boltcall
> AI-powered receptionist and automation platform for local businesses. 24/7 phone answering, appointment booking, lead capture, and automated follow-ups.

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://boltcall.org/) — Overview of Boltcall's AI receptionist platform
- [Pricing](https://boltcall.org/pricing) — Plans from $389/mo to $799/mo
- [About](https://boltcall.org/about) — Company information

## Features
- [AI Receptionist](https://boltcall.org/features/ai-receptionist) — 24/7 AI phone answering for local businesses
- [Speed to Lead](https://boltcall.org/features/instant-form-reply) — Instant lead response system
- [Automated Reminders](https://boltcall.org/features/automated-reminders) — Appointment reminder automation
- [AI Follow-Up](https://boltcall.org/features/ai-follow-up-system) — Automated lead nurturing
- [SMS Booking](https://boltcall.org/features/sms-booking-assistant) — Text-based appointment booking
- [Website Widget](https://boltcall.org/features/website-widget) — AI chatbot widget for websites

## Free Tools
- [SEO Audit](https://boltcall.org/seo-audit) — Free website SEO analysis
- [AI Revenue Calculator](https://boltcall.org/ai-revenue-calculator) — Calculate ROI of AI receptionist

- [AI vs Human Receptionist](https://boltcall.org/blog/ai-vs-human-receptionist) — Comparison guide
